items.headline: Claude Code 2.1.166 hardens cross-session messaging
items.body: the 2.1.166 Claude Code update ships fallback model support, glob pattern matching, and cross-session messaging hardening. fallback models mean fewer failed CI runs when a model tier is under load — worth wiring up in the portfolio workflow config. cross-session hardening tightens inter-session state, relevant anywhere `claude -p` runs as part of a pipeline.

items.headline: lockdown mode: a prompt injection defense worth porting
items.body: OpenAI shipped Lockdown Mode for ChatGPT, targeting prompt injection attacks that exfiltrate data via crafted context. the threat model maps directly to MCP servers: a work item or PR description in Azure DevOps could carry injection payload targeting ADO MCP. no equivalent protection exists in current MCP tooling; the Lockdown Mode design is worth studying before ADO MCP handles more sensitive data.
